description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The exterior features a mix of white and beige walls, large glass windows, and wooden accent panels, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The house is surrounded by paved walkways and driveways, with a small landscaped area including a tree. Multiple outdoor terraces and balconies are visible, providing ample space for outdoor living. The windows are generously sized and asymmetrically arranged, allowing for plenty of natural light. The main entryway is defined by a covered porch and a prominent pathway leading up to the door.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by paved walkways and terraces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway, a large paved driveway, and the front terrace with visible interior living spaces.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear of the house, a secondary entry, and a landscaped area with a tree, as well as more of the outdoor terrace.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the extensive glass windows, a long paved walkway, and the open terrace area.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals the back and side of the house, wooden accent fencing, and additional terrace space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a wide pathway, modern door, and minimalistic overhang
